final:
module top_module(
    input [15:0] A,
    output reg [15:0] B
);always @(*) begin
        if (A[15] == 1) begin
            B = ~A + 1;
        end else begin
            B = A;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      B = A; if (A[15] == 0) begin B = ~A + 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: B = A; if (A[15] == 0) begin B = ~A + 1; end
